title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 2.020 - Preservation of original rolls
text:
2.020.  Preservation of original rolls. — As soon as practicable after the laws passed at any session of the general assembly are printed and delivered, the secretary of state shall preserve and make available to the public for inspection the original rolls safely in his or her office.
(RSMo 1939 § 664, A.L. 1945 p. 1112, A.L. 1957 p. 587, A.L. 2020 H.B. 1655) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 664; 1919 § 7067; 1909 § 8066
